messages.content: 什么是海洋

the ocean covers 71 percent of earths surface and contains 97 percent of all water on the planet there are five major oceans pacific atlantic indian southern and arctic the pacific is the largest and deepest average ocean depth is 3688 meters the ocean produces over half the worlds oxygen and absorbs carbon dioxide
什么是原子

an atom is the smallest unit of ordinary matter that forms a chemical element it consists of a nucleus containing protons and neutrons surrounded by electrons in orbitals the number of protons defines the element hydrogen has one proton carbon has six atoms are extremely small about 100 picometers in diameter
什么是沙漠

a desert is a barren area of land with little precipitation making living conditions hostile for plant and animal life deserts cover about one third of the earths land surface the largest hot desert is the sahara in africa covering 9 million square kilometers deserts can be hot or cold like antarctica
什么是黑洞

a black hole is a region of spacetime where gravity is so strong that nothing not even light can escape it forms when a massive star collapses at the end of its life the boundary is called the event horizon supermassive black holes exist at the center of most galaxies including our milky way they can have masses of millions to billions of suns
什么是dna

dna or deoxyribonucleic acid is a molecule that carries the genetic instructions for life it consists of two strands twisted into a double helix made of four bases adenine thymine guanine and cytosine human dna contains about 3 billion base pairs organized into 23 chromosome pairs dna replicates before cell division
什么是引力

gravity is the force of attraction between any two objects with mass newtons law states the force is proportional to mass times mass divided by distance squared einsteins general relativity describes gravity as the curvature of spacetime caused by mass gravity keeps planets in orbit and holds galaxies together gravitational waves were first detected in 2015
地球有多大

earth has a diameter of about 12742 kilometers at the equator and 12700 kilometers from pole to pole its circumference is about 40075 kilometers the surface area is 510 million square kilometers with 71 percent covered by water and 29 percent by land it is the fifth largest planet in our solar system
什么是光速

the speed of light in vacuum is 299792458 meters per second approximately 300000 kilometers per second this is the maximum speed at which energy or information can travel in the universe light from the sun takes about 8 minutes to reach earth einsteins special relativity established that nothing with mass can reach light speed
什么是森林

a forest is a large area dominated by trees and other woody vegetation forests cover about 30 percent of earths land area they are essential for biodiversity carbon storage oxygen production water cycle regulation and climate stabilization tropical rainforests contain over half of all terrestrial species
什么是火山

a volcano is an opening in the earths crust where molten rock gas and ash erupt to the surface there are about 1500 potentially active volcanoes worldwide about 500 have erupted in historical time volcanoes form at tectonic plate boundaries and over hotspots the ring of fire around the pacific has 75 percent of the worlds volcanoes
